data.title: Temu 'Hyper-Growth' Era Over? PDD Misses Estimates Due To Higher Costs, Weak Demand
data.description: PDD Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: PDD) released its fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 results, which fell short of the Street's expectations. The company reported a 12% year-on-year revenue growth to $17.72 billion (123.92 billion Chinese yuan), missing the analyst consensus of $17.93 billion. Revenue from online marketing services and others increased by 5% Y/Y to $8.58 billion, while revenue from transaction services grew by 19% Y/Y to $9.14 billion. Total costs of revenues rose by 15% Y/Y to $7.89 billion, attributed to higher fulfilment fees, bandwidth, server costs, and payment processing fees. Operating expenses also saw a 10% Y/Y increase to $5.87 billion. Adjusted operating profit rose by 5.3% Y/Y to $4.21 billion, with the adjusted operating margin decreasing from 25.3% to 23.8% Y/Y. Net income declined by 11% Y/Y to $3.51 billion, while adjusted net income fell by 12% to $3.76 billion. For more details, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Michael + Susan Dell to Ring Opening Bell with Invest America
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) has released its pre-market daily advisory straight from the trading floor. This announcement was made on March 25, 2026. Investors can access the NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights before the trading day commences.

data.title: Gladwell Orthodontics Expands to Durham, NC with New State-of-the-Art Location
data.description: In a recent press release on March 25, 2026, it was announced that Gladwell Orthodontics has opened a new branch in Durham, North Carolina. This move signifies the practice's dedication to expansion and enhancing access to top-quality orthodontic services for families in the area. The new location offers advanced, patient-focused care in line with the practice's commitment to excellence.

data.title: Unihertz's Titan 2 Elite QWERTY Smartphone Campaign Gains Strong Kickstarter Support
data.description: Unihertz's crowdfunding campaign has garnered significant attention, underscoring the sustained demand for its unique productivity-focused smartphones featuring tactile keyboards. The Shanghai-based company, renowned for its innovative mobile devices, recently initiated a campaign that has attracted a substantial number of backers. The success of the venture showcases the ongoing interest in Unihertz's products, reflecting the popularity of the brand's distinct offerings in the tech market.

data.title: Dollar Flight Club Reports Airfare Prices Down as Much as 35% in Spring Hot Spots
data.description: Latest Report Reveals Ideal and Less Advantageous Destinations for Booking SEATTLE, 25th March 2026 - Dollar Flight Club, a prominent tool for discovering tailored flight bargains, has unveiled essential insights on the fluctuating costs of air travel. According to the report, flight prices have seen a significant decrease in select destinations, while others have experienced a notable spike in costs.

data.title: "Helpless Earth: Reckless Science" by Yuval Kanev Challenges Scientists' Competence, Reliability, And Integrity Amid Escalating Technological Threats to Humanity's Survival
data.description: In Haifa, Israel, a book titled "Helpless Earth: Reckless Science" has been released on March 25, 2026. The book criticizes scientific institutions for increasing existential risks, failing to take responsibility, and spreading widespread misinformation. It calls out a lack of accountability in the scientific community, shedding light on the dangers posed by these actions. The book questions the transparency of scientists and highlights the need for greater honesty in their work. The author challenges the readers to consider which scientist has openly confessed to their role in these issues.

data.title: Rönesans Holding Announces New Global Partnership
data.description: Rönesans Holding has recently entered into a strategic partnership with SJ Group, marking a significant move in their collaboration to further advancements at the DAPEK Industrial Zone in Istanbul. The partnership, signed on March 25, 2026, will play a crucial role in driving development in the Eastern Mediterranean region. This initiative aims to enhance industrial activities and boost economic growth in the area. The partnership is set to facilitate the delivery of key projects and services within the industrial zone.

data.title: DigitalOcean Announces Pricing of Upsized Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Today, DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN), a leading Agentic Inference Cloud provider for production AI, disclosed the pricing details of an increased underwritten offering. The offering consists of 10,389,611 shares of its common stock, generating around $800 million in total gross proceeds. Additionally, DigitalOcean has provided the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 1,558,441 more shares of common stock at the public offering price, minus underwriting discounts.

data.title: CorePlus and Ibex Expand Partnership with Clinical Deployment of AI-Powered Diagnostics for TURP
data.description: In Carolina, Puerto Rico, CorePlus Servicios Clínicos y Patológicos, LLC (CorePlus) and Ibex Medical Analytics introduced the first clinical application of Ibex Prostate for Transurethral Resection of the Prostate (TURP). CorePlus, a CLIA-certified laboratory specializing in high-complexity services and digital transformation, teamed up with Ibex, a renowned AI-based cancer diagnostics innovator. This deployment marks a milestone in offering swift diagnostic aid to handle high volumes. Ibex Prostate has been implemented for efficient diagnostic support in this partnership.

data.title: UiPath Announces New Agentic Solution to Accelerate Procurement Cycles
data.description: UiPath has recently unveiled the UiPath Solution for Purchase-to-Pay (P2P), an innovative AI solution aimed at assisting finance teams by integrating agents into their processes.

data.title: UiPath Optimizes Retail and Manufacturing Operations with New Agentic Solutions
data.description: UiPath, a technology company based in New York, has recently introduced revolutionary AI solutions designed to assist retailers and manufacturers in streamlining and automating intricate workflows. This innovative technology aims to enhance efficiency in various processes within these industries.

data.title: Mainelove CEO Jen Millard Named Mainebiz Business Leader of the Year
data.description: In Portland, Maine on March 25, 2026, mainelove, a local canned water company focused on sustainability and community involvement, revealed that their CEO and co-founder, Jen Millard, has been honored as Mainebiz's Business Leader of the Year. This recognition highlights her significant contributions to the state of Maine.

data.title: Triple-A Integrates with Circle Payments Network to Support Cross-Border Stablecoin Settlement
data.description: Singapore, March 25, 2026 - Triple-A, a licensed financial institution operating globally, has confirmed its integration with Circle Payments Network (CPN), managed by Circle Technology Services, LLC, an affiliate of Circle Internet Group, Inc. This announcement comes as Circle Internet Group, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CRCL. The collaboration between Triple-A and CPN signifies a significant partnership within the financial sector.

data.title: Handwave: half of consumers would pay with their palm if privacy is guaranteed, survey finds
data.description: A growing dissatisfaction with existing payment methods and opposition towards stores that only accept cards is pushing for the adoption of more adaptable, touchless alternatives. The younger demographic is spearheading this shift, with 46% of individuals aged 25-34 already embracing palm payments. Despite this trend, the primary apprehension among consumers continues to be the potential misuse of their data.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Amenism, Inc./
data.description: Amenism, Inc. has recently unveiled a groundbreaking concept called Vicarious Authorship, which offers a fresh approach to human-AI collaboration. This news was released on 24-Mar-2026 by the company through PR Newswire. Amid this update, the headline has been revised. The individual involved in this announcement is Tarik Karenga.
